nodes.title: Start Here
nodes.summary: A simple trail through the alphabet from A to Z.
nodes.content: This trail exists to make federation obvious. Clone the substrate, open it in Studio or Workspace, and follow the letters from A through Z while the media assets travel with the substrate.

nodes.title: Alphabet Sequence
nodes.summary: The conventional English alphabet sequence used by this sample substrate.

nodes.title: Letter A
nodes.summary: A is letter 1 in the alphabet sample substrate.
nodes.content: Letter A is included as both a node and a bundled media asset so tools can test portable substrate media without relying on remote files.
